job.title: Senior Frontend Developer
job.description: We are hiring a contract-based Senior Frontend Developer for the garden3d creative collective with a focus on LATAM & Asia candidates. This job posting here in Remotive is for sharing purposes only and does not serve as the direct application for the role. To be considered, please complete our application form here to apply Original job posting link 🌎 About garden3d We are worker owned creative collective, innovating on everything from brands and IRL communities to IoT devices and cross platform apps. We share profit, open source everything, spin out new businesses, and invest in exciting ideas through financial and/or in-kind contributions. Our client roster includes Google , Stripe , Figma , Hinge , Black Socialists in America , ACLU , Pratt , Parsons , Mozilla , The Nobel Prize , MIT , Gnosis , Etsy & Gagosian . We’re the software team behind innovative products like The Light Phone & Mill , and we operate a global, decentralized community space collective called Index Space . We think of our garden3d as collective for creative people, prioritizing a happy, talented, and diverse studio culture. We work on projects that bring value to our world, and we balance deep care for the work we do with a genuine curiosity about life outside of our jobs. 🔮 Who we’re looking for: We're looking for a Senior Frontend Developer who excels at building pixel-perfect websites using modern frontend frameworks. You'll collaborate with our team to build elegant, performant, and visually stunning web experiences. Your work will span a diverse range of client projects, from immersive brand websites to complex web applications, all requiring a keen eye for detail and technical excellence. This hiring effort will focus on Front-End Developers based in the LATAM or ASIA. In this role, you’ll work on a variety of client projects to find cost-effective, high-quality, pragmatic solutions to complex problems. Responsibilities will include: Collaborating with Technical Lead to meet clients' development needs Building and maintaining high-performance web applications with modern frontend frameworks and tools Implementing responsive, accessible, and pixel-perfect user interfaces based on design specifications Integrating frontend applications with headless CMS platforms, APIs, and third-party services Optimizing application performance, including bundle size, load times, and runtime efficiency Architecting scalable component libraries and design systems for consistency across projects Writing clear documentation for code maintenance and usage Participating in project team meetings, including Sprint Planning, daily standups, and retrospectives Participating in code reviews, providing constructive feedback to teammates and ensuring adherence to best practices The person we’re looking for is happy, relaxed and easy to get along with. They’re flexible on anything except conceits that will lower their usually outstanding work quality. They work “smart”, by carefully

match.recommendation: Badejo has solid frontend engineering experience with React.js, performance optimization, and collaborative workflows that align well with the technical demands of this role. However, the job specifically targets LATAM or Asia-based candidates, which is a hard geographic filter this Nigeria-based candidate does not meet. Additionally, the role emphasizes pixel-perfect, visually immersive brand websites typical of a creative agency, while the resume leans more toward SaaS and enterprise application development.
keyStrengths: 4+ years of React.js experience with measurable performance improvements (45% load time reduction)
Proven cross-functional collaboration with designers and backend engineers for pixel-perfect UI delivery
Demonstrated scalability and state management expertise using Redux Toolkit and Context API

applications.coverLetter:
Dear Hiring Manager,

Sanctuary Computer's work on The Light Phone and Mill — products that genuinely challenge how people interact with technology — reflects exactly the kind of purposeful frontend work I want to build my career around. A collective that open-sources everything and shares profit isn't a standard agency; that model earns my full commitment.

At Fivani, I engineered React.js applications that cut load times by 45% and reduced code complexity by 35% through React Hooks and Context API integration. At Limestone, I delivered pixel-perfect, responsive UIs across web and mobile, collaborating directly with designers and backend engineers to ship production-ready features on tight timelines. My stack — React, Next.js, React Native, and modern state management — maps directly to the cross-platform, visually demanding projects garden3d takes on.

What I bring is a frontend engineer who moves fast without accumulating technical debt, communicates clearly across disciplines, and treats design fidelity as non-negotiable. I'm based in Lagos, fully remote-ready, and built for the kind of varied, high-craft client work your roster demands.

Ayotayo Patrick Badejo
